title: Young voters shun Trump, plan to vote blue in midterms, poll says

shortDescription: Congress remains in recess as lawmakers remain divided over how to fund the Department of Homeland Security. Disagreements over immigration enforcement funding delay a final deal.

title: Carney clinches majority government in Canadian special elections

title: Italy's prime minister issues rare rebuke of Trump after pope attack
shortDescription: The statement represented an extremely rare public rebuke of Trump from Giorgia Meloni, underscoring widespread anger in Italy.

title: Was Trump Queen Elizabeth II’s favorite president? She wouldn’t say. | The Excerpt
shortDescription: Queen Elizabeth met 13 sitting U.S. presidents in her 70-year reign. In one way or another, she touched all of them, as they did her.

title: Swalwell resigns from Congress after allegations
